tasks.label: Fix 2-SAT and Git Push
tasks.command: python3 /Users/arnavgupta/CompetitiveProgramming/fix_2sat.py && git add "Linear Algebra/2-SAT.md" && git commit -m "Fix 2-SAT.md formatting based on updated prompt rules" && git push

tasks.label: Run fixes

tasks.label: Git Push BS
